blockers.description: iOS long-press on icon buttons triggers native image save dialog instead of press animation.
blockers.workaround: Add `-webkit-touch-callout: none; user-select: none;` to .icon-tile CSS in both TuningPage and GaragePage. Add `pointerEvents: 'none'` to all icon elements. This prevents the callout and routes touch through the button.

human_actions_pending.action: Delete duplicate Datsun — SQL: DELETE FROM vehicle_makes WHERE id = 2863
human_actions_pending.context: Two Datsun rows: id 36758 (keep) and id 2863 (NHTSA duplicate, delete).

human_actions_pending.action: Run Estima SQL if not done
human_actions_pending.context: INSERT INTO public.vehicle_models (make_id, model_name, year_start, year_end, is_jdm_only, body_style, source) SELECT id, 'Estima', 1990, 2019, true, 'minivan', 'jdm_manual' FROM public.vehicle_makes WHERE make_name ILIKE 'Toyota' ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

human_actions_pending.action: DB cleanup — remove Honda motorcycles, consolidate Silvia/Skyline
human_actions_pending.context: Honda models include motorcycles (CBR, CRF, etc.). Silvia S13/S14/S15 → Silvia; Skyline R32/R33/R34 → Skyline.

decisions.rationale: User preferred 'The Shop' after testing. Hanken Grotesk bold italic -0.1em at fontSize 24.

decisions.decision: Icon layout: L-shape with absolute positioning
decisions.rationale: Blueprint (left:16, bottom:190), Build Sheet (left:58, bottom:54), Parts Bin (left:222, bottom:88). Asymmetric to complement the off-center lift in the background. Lift columns are on the right of the image.
Blueprint/BuildSheet are landscape PNGs (~330x230), Parts Bin is squarer (~300x254). Blueprint/BuildSheet labelMargin:-6, Parts Bin labelMargin:6.

decisions.decision: Three Tuning sub-sections: Build Sheet (on car), Blueprint (planned), Parts Bin (owned not installed)
decisions.rationale: Matches real JDM owner mental model. Parts flow: Blueprint → Parts Bin → Build Sheet. Add directly within each sub-screen for v1.

decisions.decision: tuning_hero.png: late-night premium JDM workshop, 3/4 angle, empty lift, gloss white floor, red accents
decisions.rationale: Generated on NanoBanana. No car to avoid copyright. Nismo Omori Factory reference.

decisions.decision: Snapshot redesigned as practical handoff card, not full spec sheet
decisions.rationale: A shop doesn't need HP/torque — they have a scanner. Build Sheet = enthusiast specs.

decisions.decision: Snapshot sections: Vehicle, Service, Important Dates, Contacts
decisions.rationale: Matches user mockup. Important Dates = registration + insurance renewal.

decisions.decision: Details overlay in My Cars has Vehicle Specs section
decisions.rationale: All specs (engine, HP, torque, transmission, etc.) editable from My Cars → Details.

decisions.decision: CarReflection FL constants: FL_FX=0.13 FL_FY=1.1 FL_RX=0.93 FL_RY=0.82 FL_DEPTH=0.28
decisions.rationale: FL_FY>1.0 intentional — extends floor contact below image for front tire perspective.

next_action: Fix iOS long-press issue: in TuningPage and GaragePage
context_notes: Dev server runs on port 5173 or 5176 with --host flag. App at ~/Desktop/g-dimension. Supabase: uxqoernfrtgclpneirvc. TuningPage hero is visually complete and approved. The Shop name approved. Sub-screens are stubs — routes wired in App.tsx. Snapshot is a practical handoff card. photo_y_offset column (0-100, default 50) controls vertical crop. gdim_chosen_car_id in localStorage selects active car for Snapshot.
